recap:
- Transform parsed JSON text into markdown-formatted or plain text for LLMs.
- Compare LLM-powered semantic cleaning with fast concatenation methods for text transformation.
- Chunk cleaned text by page, incorporating overlap for contextual understanding using LangChain.
- Store the final chunked text for further use in embedding and vector search processes.
- Understand the importance of both semantic cleaning and fast methods in text preparation for LLMs.
